data.title: Dow Jumps Over 100 Points; ISM Manufacturing PMI Increases In December
Why Cyclacel Pharmaceuticals (CYCC) Stock Is Skyrocketing
data.description: Cyclacel Pharmaceuticals shares are trading higher by 77% during Friday's session. The company announced a securities purchase agreement with investor David Lazar.

data.title: CEO At Mission Produce Sells $77K Of Stock
Molson Coors, Diageo, Boston Beer Plunge As Surgeon General Warns 'Alcohol Consumption Increases' Cancer Risk
data.description: Surgeon General warns of cancer risks from alcohol, urges updates to labels and limits. Stocks of major alcohol companies plunge in response.

data.title: Biden Blocks $14.9B US Steel Takeover, Shares Plunge
data.description: President Joe Biden blocked the $14.9 billion acquisition of United States Steel Corp. (NYSE: X) by Nippon Steel Corp. (OTC: NPSCY), citing national security risks. Biden emphasized the vital role of domestic steel in supporting U.S. infrastructure and defense.
